channel.title: program on mahmood
channel.description: Recent content in program on mahmood

item.title: gpg
item.description: encrypt file with password gpg -o <output-file> -c <file-to-encrypt> the argument -o takes the path to the output file (the encrypted one) and the flag -c tells gpg that we want to encrypt, you will be prompted to enter a password decrypt file with password gpg -o <output-file> -d <file-to-decrypt> the argument -o takes the path to the output file (the decrypted one) and the flag -d tells gpg that we want to decrypt encrypt directory with password to encrypt a directory, we simply compress it into a file: tar -cvf archive.
